_comment: NIL athlete dataset. Figures are estimated 12-month NIL valuations from public reporting (On3, FOX Sports, SportsGrid) and/or our model — not amounts paid. 'reported: true' cites a public figure (see source). Add athletes here and run `node scripts/build.js` to regenerate pages + sitemap. Keep data accurate and sourced — each page must offer real value to rank.

athletes.name: Arch Manning
athletes.blurb: The Texas quarterback and member of the Manning football dynasty holds the highest NIL valuation of any college athlete heading into 2026, driven by elite name recognition and a blue-chip program.

athletes.name: Jeremiah Smith
athletes.blurb: After a standout freshman season, the Ohio State receiver became the first college athlete on a Red Bull can and signed with Adidas, EA Sports, Nintendo and more — fueling a top-tier NIL valuation.

athletes.name: Carson Beck
athletes.blurb: The veteran quarterback transferred to Miami and carries one of the highest NIL valuations in college football, backed by national exposure in the ACC.

athletes.name: Sam Leavitt
athletes.blurb: Arizona State's quarterback emerged as a national name and a top-five NIL valuation after leading the Sun Devils' breakout.

athletes.name: LaNorris Sellers
athletes.blurb: South Carolina's dynamic dual-threat quarterback is among the SEC's most valuable NIL assets heading into 2026.

athletes.name: Garrett Nussmeier
athletes.blurb: LSU's quarterback ranks among the top NIL earners in college football, boosted by the Tigers' national brand.

athletes.name: Cade Klubnik
athletes.blurb: Clemson's starting quarterback carries a multi-million-dollar NIL valuation as a face of the ACC.

athletes.name: Drew Allar
athletes.blurb: Penn State's quarterback is one of the Big Ten's highest-valued NIL athletes heading into 2026.

athletes.name: Dante Moore
athletes.blurb: Oregon's quarterback holds a seven-figure NIL valuation as the Ducks compete at the top of the Big Ten.

athletes.name: Bryce Underwood
athletes.blurb: The heralded Michigan freshman quarterback arrived with one of the largest NIL valuations of any incoming player in the country.

athletes.name: AJ Dybantsa
athletes.blurb: The BYU freshman phenom is among the highest-valued basketball players in the country, with a valuation rivaling the top college football stars.

athletes.name: JT Toppin
athletes.blurb: Texas Tech's standout forward returned to school on a major NIL package, making him one of college basketball's highest-valued players.

athletes.name: Cameron Boozer
athletes.blurb: The Duke freshman and son of NBA veteran Carlos Boozer is among the most valuable newcomers in college basketball.

athletes.name: Morez Johnson Jr.
athletes.blurb: The Michigan forward carries a seven-figure NIL valuation among the Wolverines' rising basketball core.

athletes.name: Jayden Quaintance
athletes.blurb: Kentucky's young big man is one of the highest-valued sophomores in college basketball.

athletes.name: Caleb Wilson
athletes.blurb: The North Carolina freshman forward ranks near the top of college basketball NIL valuations.

athletes.name: Braden Smith
athletes.blurb: Purdue's senior floor general is one of the most valuable returning guards in college basketball.

athletes.name: Denzel Aberdeen
athletes.blurb: The Kentucky guard carries a seven-figure NIL valuation after transferring into a national-title contender.

athletes.name: Flau'jae Johnson
athletes.blurb: The LSU guard and recording artist is the highest-valued player in women's college basketball, with a huge social following and 20-plus brand deals.

athletes.name: JuJu Watkins
athletes.blurb: USC's superstar guard is among the most marketable players in women's college basketball, with national endorsement appeal.

athletes.name: NiJaree Canady
athletes.blurb: Texas Tech's ace became the first softball player to cross the $1M NIL threshold after leading the Red Raiders to a Women's College World Series appearance.

athletes.name: Kai Trump
athletes.blurb: The Miami golf commit carries one of the largest NIL valuations in women's sports, powered by an enormous social following and national name recognition.

athletes.name: Jade Carey
athletes.blurb: The Olympic gold medalist and Oregon State gymnast is one of the highest-valued NIL athletes in college gymnastics.

athletes.name: Cam Coleman
athletes.blurb: The explosive wide receiver is among the most valuable non-quarterbacks in college football, adding to Texas's loaded roster.

athletes.name: Yaxel Lendeborg
athletes.blurb: After transferring from UAB to Michigan, the versatile forward saw his NIL value jump to among the highest in the Big Ten.

athletes.name: Darryn Peterson
athletes.blurb: The Kansas freshman guard and projected top NBA Draft pick carries star power and a seven-figure NIL valuation.

athletes.name: Jada Williams
athletes.blurb: An early NIL pioneer, the Arizona guard pairs veteran leadership with a 1.1M-plus social following to rank among women's basketball's most valuable players.

athletes.name: Azzi Fudd
athletes.blurb: The UConn sharpshooter and national champion is one of the most recognizable names in women's college basketball.

athletes.name: Deja Kelly
athletes.blurb: The veteran guard is a proven NIL performer and one of the higher-valued players in women's college basketball.

athletes.name: Chloe Kitts
athletes.blurb: The South Carolina forward and national champion is a key NIL name for the powerhouse Gamecocks.

athletes.name: Caden Sorrell
athletes.blurb: A projected top-15 MLB Draft pick and the face of the Aggies, Sorrell holds one of the highest NIL valuations in college baseball.

athletes.name: Gavin Guidry
athletes.blurb: The LSU pitcher is among the top NIL names in college baseball as a key arm for the national-contender Tigers.

athletes.name: DJ Lagway
athletes.blurb: The Florida quarterback owns one of the highest NIL valuations in college football as the face of the Gators' offense.

athletes.name: Julian Sayin
athletes.blurb: After a 32-touchdown redshirt-freshman season, the Ohio State quarterback is among the most valuable NIL players in the country.

athletes.name: Caleb Downs
athletes.blurb: One of the most valuable defensive players in college football, the Ohio State safety pairs elite play with deals from Beats and Panini.

athletes.name: Dylan Raiola
athletes.blurb: The Nebraska quarterback is the centerpiece of the Cornhuskers' rebuild and one of the highest-valued QBs in the sport.

athletes.name: Nico Iamaleava
athletes.blurb: After a high-profile transfer to UCLA, the quarterback remains one of the most talked-about NIL names in college football.

athletes.name: Ryan Williams
athletes.blurb: The electric Alabama wide receiver and former five-star recruit carries brand deals with Uber Eats and Hollister.

athletes.name: Hannah Hidalgo
athletes.source: Estimate (widely reported, ~$1M; On3 does not disclose exact figure)
athletes.blurb: The Notre Dame guard is one of the biggest stars in women's college basketball, with deals from Red Bull, New Era and Topps and CAA representation.

athletes.name: Tahaad Pettiford
athletes.source: Estimate (reported ~$2.1M NIL deal; On3 does not disclose exact figure)
athletes.blurb: The Auburn point guard returned for his junior season on a reported seven-figure NIL package, turning down larger offers elsewhere.

athletes.name: John Mateer
athletes.blurb: After choosing to return to Oklahoma rather than enter the NFL Draft, Mateer is the highest-valued player in Sooners history, anchored by a Beats by Dre deal.

athletes.name: PJ Haggerty
athletes.blurb: One of the most coveted players in the transfer portal, the high-scoring guard landed at Kansas State on a reported $2.5M NIL deal.

athletes.name: Bennett Stirtz
athletes.source: Estimate (reported ~$1.7M; On3 does not disclose exact figure)
athletes.blurb: The All-Transfer Team point guard followed coach Ben McCollum from Drake to Iowa and quickly became one of the Big Ten's most valuable players.
